faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: Does the BTech Electrical Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?
faqs.answer:
The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

placements.overview:
K.P. Group of Institutions is a private institute, established in 2007 in Agra, Uttar Pradesh. K.P. Group of Institutions is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 22 courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in 7 specialisations such as Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, BCA, BBA and After 10th Diploma in Full Time mode. K.P. Group of Institutions fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800. K.P. Group of Institutions has an annual seat intake of 360 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

K.P. Group of Institutions offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. Whereas, at PG level, K.P. Group of Institutions offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. K.P. Group of Institutions fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800.

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Sanketika Institute of Technology and Management admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sanketika Institute of Technology and Management is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech. The fee structure for the Sanketika Institute of Technology and Management programmes is around INR 1,10,000 to 1,40,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for studies, but they must provide more practical knowledge.

review_content.Placements: There have been no campus placements in our college since we joined. Even if there are placements, the companies are the worst. But recently, some campus placement drives have been conducted in our college. I hope this continues, and the college brings more companies for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good. The labs have equipment that doesn't work. The classrooms are huge, and each branch has a separate block and can easily accommodate 120 students at a time. A seminar hall is present, where we can conduct different programs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I had a nice experience in B.Tech at our college.

review_content.Placements: We didn't get any placements in our college. We used to go to other colleges for placements. Sometimes our college faculty members provided information regarding interviews which are conducted in other colleges. We visited those colleges for interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were good in our college compared to other colleges in Visakhapatnam. It is most nearer engineering college for students who come from Visakhapatnam because it was located in PM Palem. All other colleges were far from that place.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017

overview_faqs.question: Can Sanketika Institute of Technology and Management be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Sanketika Institute of Technology and Management is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Sanketika Institute of Technology and Management boasts an impressive review rating of 3.05 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.32 for Campus Life, 2.46 for Placements, 3.13 for Faculty, and 3.22 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sanketika Institute of Technology and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Truth from experience can be believed

content.Placements: Sixty percent of students are placed in my course every year. Six Lacs per annum was the highest package. TCS is the top recruiter. 60% of students get internship in our course and college. Backend and frontend operators are the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good for students. Labs should be maintained clean and renewed. Library is good with all required books. Food is not provided by college. Huge ground is available for students. Medical facilities are also provided and canteen is also available with tasty food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: STMV provides knowledge and enjoyment.

content.Placements: The placement rate is low. They will ask us to go to some other colleges to attend the placement programs. Our principal knows some TCS employees, so we get internships at TCS in our third year.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Physics and chemistry labs are available with all instruments. Our college doesn't provide hostels, but PGs are available at reasonable fees. Shops are available to buy books and food.
content.Faculty: Our college is affiliated with JNTUH. Exams are easy. Faculty members are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good for studies, but they must provide more practical knowledge.

content.Placements: There have been no campus placements in our college since we joined. Even if there are placements, the companies are the worst. But recently, some campus placement drives have been conducted in our college. I hope this continues, and the college brings more companies for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good. The labs have equipment that doesn't work. The classrooms are huge, and each branch has a separate block and can easily accommodate 120 students at a time. A seminar hall is present, where we can conduct different programs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I had a nice experience in B.Tech at our college.

content.Placements: We didn't get any placements in our college. We used to go to other colleges for placements. Sometimes our college faculty members provided information regarding interviews which are conducted in other colleges. We visited those colleges for interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were good in our college compared to other colleges in Visakhapatnam. It is most nearer engineering college for students who come from Visakhapatnam because it was located in PM Palem. All other colleges were far from that place.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: An average looking college with an above average approach.

content.Placements: Considering the training provided by the training and placement cell as well as the number of companies conducting interviews in the college every year, the placements in our college can be 4-6 stars out of 10. Except, all those companies are either BPOs or call centres or any software and IT related companies. Placements in the core fields like mechanical, electrical, and civil are way too low when compared to other colleges. Even the HR department is not that supportive.
content.Infrastructure: Firstly, the classrooms are well-established and well-furnished according to the aspects, and the respective departments are also considered to be the most distinctive. Whereas, the labs regarding the technical aspects are way larger than the other colleges. Except that the labs are to be shared with the diploma and another college students besides ours which makes it bit more tangible and substantially irksome. The seminar hall is not at all built according to the aspects which makes it quite smaller than the classrooms.

Sanketika Institute of Technology and Management course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theSanketika Institute of Technology and Managementapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG and PG programmes in fields of Engineering, and more. To know about the eligibility of Sanketika Institute of Technology and Management courses, students can visit the website.

Sanketika Institute of Technology and Management fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. placements.overview: Modern Engineering and Management Studies offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Modern Engineering and Management Studies courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Modern Engineering and Management Studies courses stands around INR 1,20,000 to 2,20,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: This is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: All students get maximum marks in this course of this college. The highest salary package offered was 12.30 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1.23 LPA. Tata, Maruti Suzuki, Mahindra, Hero Honda, Yamaha, etc., were the top recruiting companies. Around 75% of students get internships opportunity in Tata, Maruti Suzuki, etc. A lot of work experience was offered by expertise.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college provides excellent infrastructure. The college provides a 24X7 Wi-Fi facility. The laboratories of this college were excellent and with all equipment. In the library all the engineer books were available. Classroom with good furniture and smart classroom. The hostel facility was good for students, and the food availability was good. Medical facilities were available 24X7.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college to make your future.

review_content.Placements: Students scored above 6 CGP. This course is good for students' future. If you learn all programming languages, then you can get good salary packages in good companies like Facebook, Google, etc. You can get an internship if you score above 7 CGP.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available for the course are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library. The hostel is available inside the college campus. The mess food is good, and there are many sports to play. In every room of the hostel, there are three beds, and they do cleaning every day. Students go for an outing once a month.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good for Study, Not Recommended for Campus Selection

content.Placements: Mainly, 90% of students got jobs after graduation. Courses like QSpider came over and selected students. I'm not recommending this place for campus selection for a good reason, but the course fees are less than others, so the choice is yours.
content.Infrastructure: We have a big collection of books in our library. We have internet access in our hostel and clean drinking water. There are classrooms, but the air conditioning doesn't always work. There are two labs for students. The food is decent and enough to fill you up.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Modern Engineering and Management Studies.

content.Placements: More than 50% of students were placed from here. If you're eligible, then there will be 100% placements. You have to score good to get placed. TCS, some consultancy companies and many more visit here. About 70% of students got internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: For our course, there are various facilities like different labs, all equipment required for practical and practice and fully air-conditioned classrooms. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There are 3 libraries and classrooms. The hostel is good, but the food served is below average. They always allow you to play sports and games.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to make your future.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Students do not come to the college regularly. I am totally satisfied with it.

content.Placements: Students do courses in programming languages and learn skills on their own from other states, and get placed off-campus. Companies that visit here are basically mass recruiters. Students do an internship in companies like CTTC, DRDO, etc. Some students got placed this year in companies like TCS and Accenture.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available, and labs are good. Classrooms are also good here. There is no proper canteen, and the canteen is not owned by our college. Wi-Fi is available in labs. The hostel is average. The food served in the canteen is average. Now construction work is happening in our college and air-conditioned is not working in classrooms.

hostel_campus.college_name: Modern Engineering and Management Studies Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: All the hostels have round the clock wi-fi connectivity and medical facility. These four hostels can accommodate nearly one thousand students. Several newspapers, magazines and TV facility is also available.

library.description: The central library has a collection over 21,000 information resources that include technical and general volumes ready references, encyclopedia, theses, magazines, CD-ROMs, and newspapers. The Library has a reading room for students with a great collection of reference books and magazines.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Volleyball Court, Squash Court

library.description: The central library has a collection over 21,000 information resources that include technical and general volumes ready references, encyclopedia, theses, magazines, CD-ROMs, and newspapers. The Library has a reading room for students with a great collection of reference books and magazines.

hostel.description: All the hostels have round the clock wi-fi connectivity and medical facility. These four hostels can accommodate nearly one thousand students. Several newspapers, magazines and TV facility is also available.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Volleyball Court, Squash Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.review_heading: Good for Study, Not Recommended for Campus Selection
reviews.review_text: We have a big collection of books in our library. We have internet access in our hostel and clean drinking water. There are classrooms, but the air conditioning doesn't always work. There are two labs for students. The food is decent and enough to fill you up.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Modern Engineering and Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: For our course, there are various facilities like different labs, all equipment required for practical and practice and fully air-conditioned classrooms. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There are 3 libraries and classrooms. The hostel is good, but the food served is below average. They always allow you to play sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: This college provides excellent infrastructure. The college provides a 24X7 Wi-Fi facility. The laboratories of this college were excellent and with all equipment. In the library all the engineer books were available. Classroom with good furniture and smart classroom. The hostel facility was good for students, and the food availability was good. Medical facilities were available 24X7.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to make your future.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for the course are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library. The hostel is available inside the college campus. The mess food is good, and there are many sports to play. In every room of the hostel, there are three beds, and they do cleaning every day. Students go for an outing once a month.

reviews.review_heading: Students do not come to the college regularly.  I am totally satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available, and labs are good. Classrooms are also good here. There is no proper canteen, and the canteen is not owned by our college. Wi-Fi is available in labs. The hostel is average. The food served in the canteen is average. Now construction work is happening in our college and air-conditioned is not working in classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with highly qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college should make its infrastructure better for better service. They should also make a snacks canteen for a permanent basis and also the food canteen. The college should not put the fee collection load on lecturers, and they should allow them only for providing better knowledge to students. There is everything on the campus. Canteen facilities are very good. We have our tennis court and a big playground for cricket. New buildings are under construction, which can enhance campus facilities...

reviews.review_heading: Best college for enhancing student's eligibility
reviews.review_text:
1. Everything is good in our college I. e Wi-Fi which gives 5mb/sec 24hrs, labs are fully equipped by many instruments and machines, classrooms are fully equipped by projectors and A/C and our library has 1500 books which is very essential in our studies.
2. Our college has 3 hostels I. e boys, girls hostel and a lecturer's mess, all these hostels are surveillanced by 24hrs CCTV so that it enhances our security system. Food served in canteen is really good and hygiene 
Medical checkup held once ...

reviews.review_heading: You can't get a better college than this.
reviews.review_text: The college offers a very good atmosphere for study. The college provides great facilities and great teachers. The college management is good. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. This college is perfect for gaining practical knowledge. It is a good place for extracurricular activities. The campus is huge. There is a huge playground. The college provides library facility for all students. There is a canteen where almost 800-1000 students can eat at a time. Moreover, some other constructions are g...

reviews.review_heading: No placements and less practical knowledge is provided.
reviews.review_text: In the front side, the college looks beautiful, but there are no sufficient facilities. Classrooms are good, and the canteen food is very bad. Transportation facility is quite good, but the college is worse for study purpose. There are no sufficient instruments in the labs.

reviews.review_heading: I would like to say nobody should join in this college for the sake of education.
reviews.review_text: There was no Wi-Fi facility on the campus, and only hostel students were getting the Wi-Fi facility which was also of the medium speed. Sports, games, classroom & labs were also good. The canteen facility was the worst. They overcharge for food, and even, the quality of food was not good.

reviews.review_heading: MEMS is in Banaparia, kuruda, Balasore, and Odisha.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is best, and it is on modifications every year. The library facilities are good. The classroom facilities are also by far the best. The college provides two canteens. One is for general snacks, and another is for the meal. A vast playground is also available where the students who are interested in sports can show their talent.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with my college. Because it cheated me. No placement according to its procurement.
reviews.review_text: We did not have the Wi-Fi facility on the campus. It is fake. The labs are good. The classrooms are also manageable. The library is also good for me. No medical facilities are provided. The sports facilities are also well. The canteen food is well for breakfast, lunch and dinner. The hostel rooms are also well. Some were being repaired at that time. I had faced problems regarding my fee structure when I was joining in 2013. It was told to me that Rs. 50,000 is the fee amount per year. But they c...

reviews.review_heading: Beautiful from the outside but empty from the inside.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good but not the best comparing to other colleges like BCET & SEC. Within a single building, you have all the classrooms, laboratories and an administrative office also. Mechanical and electrical labs do not have enough equipment and no students are allowed to use the Wi-Fi. There are very little facilities for sports and the medical facility is equal to zero.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good for everything.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are AC, Wi-Fi enabled campus, labs are well maintained, foods are good & the faculty members are well experienced, hostel rooms are very good.The college faculty members completed their degree from famous colleges like IIT NIT, Centurian University, Kiit University.

faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at World University of Design?

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot join the World University of Design directly. Firstly, you have to give an aptitude test, and secondly, an on-campus interview will be conducted. After passing both the steps, you can join the university. The World University of Design offers programs and degrees at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Built on a culture of creativity & innovation, students enjoy the focus on studio learning, creative process, small class size with direct access to faculty and expert technical resources. To apply for admission, visit the official website of the World University of Design and fill out the application form before the deadline.
faqs.question: Can I join World University of Design directly?

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for various courses at the World University of Design?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the World University of Design accepts NIFT exam scores. Valid scores of NIFT, NID, D-Art, CEED, and UCEED exams can be considered in lieu of DAT, and those of CET, CAT, MAT, and XAT in lieu of GAT. Candidates with a good NIFT exam score can apply for admission to the university and may be shortlisted based on their performance for the next stages of the admission process, which include a personal interview and the showcasing of creative evidence such as a portfolio, drawings, photographs, or crafts.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Graphic Communication Design - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities with good faculty support.

review_content.Placements: 85% of students were placed in our course, average package offered in course was 5 LPA (approximately). There are many recruiters like lopez design, wipro, delivery, paytm, etc. Top roles offered are: ux designer, assistant designer, cheif designer. 80% students got internship in companies like woodland, lopez design studio and local companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities offered are fully free Wi-Fi campus, spacious hostel rooms with twin sharing, good quality food with wide range of dishes, medicine room available and 24 hour first aid available with warden. A good canteen with big menu and great taste. A big ground for football and cricket and also the college has indoor games like table tennis and carrom.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Interior Architecture and Design - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is good, and I guess placements are not much great.

review_content.Placements: More than 50% of the students can get placed from our course. The highest salary package offered in our course was 6 LPA, and the lowest salary offered starts from Rs. 5,000 per month. Asian Paints is the top recruiting company for our course. I am in my first year, so I don't know about the percentage of students who got internships from our course. Top roles offered in our course are interior and spatial designer, lighting designer and visual merchandiser.
review_content.Infrastructure: I never visited the college until now due to a pandemic. However, I saw some photos and some feedback about our college, and I came to know that the infrastructure is good. But there is less workshop area in our college. I don't know about the facilities provided in hostels. Quality food is served in the mess and canteen.

review_summary.college_name: World University of Design Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Animation and Game Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A place to start your design journey.

content.Placements: I'm an animation game design student currently in my 2nd year; internships and placements are offered in my 3rd and 4th years. I have heard about companies like Rock Star, Ikarus 3D, Amazon Game Studios, etc. coming to our college and many more game development studios. Looking over the lucrative game industry In India, good jobs are hard to find and at the end of the day, it all depends on your portfolio. The college is trying their best to bring companies on campus but if one's portfolio isn't strong, he ain't going to get any jobs.
content.Infrastructure: World University has a campus size of approximately 12 acres, which is quite good for an only-design university. Specifically, for animation game design, we have pretty high-end labs with Rtx-enabled PCs and an x-pen tab for each student; even ARVR technology is provided. Talking about hostels, both boys and girls hostels have three sharing rooms equipped with air conditioning. Private washrooms are there in each room.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Animation and Game Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The campus had good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Placements were just started from the year I enrolled and many good companies showed up for campus placements. Your overall performance matters alot for the placement. Rest, they don't assure your placements but the company comes to hire you. Do visit the campus before you enroll.
content.Infrastructure: The campus and hostel were amazing. It was made beautifully and everything is built fresh. It was a beautiful and huge campus. The food served in the mess was also good and I still miss the mess food. Every day, you get good food, sometimes it's bad but mostly good. Air-conditioners were also available in the hostel. The campus had every facility and every lab that a student needed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Graphic Communication Design - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities with good faculty support.

content.Placements: 85% of students were placed in our course, average package offered in course was 5 LPA (approximately). There are many recruiters like lopez design, wipro, delivery, paytm, etc. Top roles offered are: ux designer, assistant designer, cheif designer. 80% students got internship in companies like woodland, lopez design studio and local companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities offered are fully free Wi-Fi campus, spacious hostel rooms with twin sharing, good quality food with wide range of dishes, medicine room available and 24 hour first aid available with warden. A good canteen with big menu and great taste. A big ground for football and cricket and also the college has indoor games like table tennis and carrom.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Interior Architecture and Design - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good, and I guess placements are not much great.

content.Placements: More than 50% of the students can get placed from our course. The highest salary package offered in our course was 6 LPA, and the lowest salary offered starts from Rs. 5,000 per month. Asian Paints is the top recruiting company for our course. I am in my first year, so I don't know about the percentage of students who got internships from our course. Top roles offered in our course are interior and spatial designer, lighting designer and visual merchandiser.
content.Infrastructure: I never visited the college until now due to a pandemic. However, I saw some photos and some feedback about our college, and I came to know that the infrastructure is good. But there is less workshop area in our college. I don't know about the facilities provided in hostels. Quality food is served in the mess and canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities but student are not friendly with each other.

content.Placements: Alot of companies come to college like Nykka, flipkart abf if we talk about fashion brands like ritu Kumar, admit aggarwal they also come for placement. 90%students got placement if talk about package so the highest is 22lacks and the lowest is 7lacks and almost everyone get placement and internships .
content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is so good and there are lot of facilities in Hostel also. Every room has AC. There are medical facilities and laundry also the environment is so good and if we talk about sports Thera are lot sports like football, badminton, basketball etc.

admission_overview.college_name: World University of Design Admission 2025: Eligibility, Courses, Fees & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: World University of Design Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: World University of Design admission 2025is open. The university offers around 14 courses through seven schools. The programmes are offered at UG, PG, and doctoral levels, including BDes, MDes, and PhD, etc. WUD admission 2025 is open. Applications are invited online through the official website of the university. Admission to all the courses offered byWorld University of Designis entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exam scores and also conducts an entrance test for shortlisting candidates. Read the below article to know more about World University of Design admission, eligibility criteria, selection criteria, and admission process:

World University of Design admissions 2025 are ongoing. Candidates willing to be admitted to any courses at World University of Design can check out the updated information about theWorld University of Design coursesalong with their eligibility criteria and selection criteria in the following table:
Eligibility:Graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregateSelection Criteria:CAT/WUD Aptitude Test
(Minimum 2 years’ work experience required for Design, Strategy, and Management specialisation)
Eligibility:Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate
Selection Criteria:NIFT/NID/ D-Art/UCEEDin lieu of DAT + Personal Interview
Eligibility:Graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate
Selection Criteria:DAT (CEED/ NID/ NIFT candidates will be preferred) WUD Aptitude Test+ Personal Interview
Eligibility:Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate in Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry
Selection Criteria:NATA/JEE
World University of Design admission is a multi-step process. Find below the admission steps for WUD:
Step 1: WUD Online Application
Candidates can apply online through the official website of the university along with the application fee.
Step 2: Appear for the WUD Aptitude Test

In the next step, candidates need to appear for the aptitude test. The admit cards for this test are issued on the official website of WUD. The selection will be done based on the candidate's performance in the entrance test.
Step 3: WUD Campus Interview

Selected candidates will be eligible to appear in the personal interview conducted by the WUD admission panel. The interview will be related to the field of study selected by the candidates. Creative evidence (portfolio, drawings, photographs, crafts, etc.) in hard copy may also be showcased.
Step 4: WUD Admission Confirmation
A confirmation email will be sent to the selected candidates. The selected candidates need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

faqs.question: What are the cutoff marks required for B.Des at World University of Design?
faqs.answer: Candidates must make sure they have the necessary Senior Secondary Examination credentials and must have received at least a 50% in the qualifying exam. The age restriction for the BDes programme at different institutions must also be followed by candidates. For the World University of Design, the WUD Entrance Score required for B.Des is 70-79.9%. Additionally, there is a requirement of an aggregate of 187.5-92.4% in 10+2 of CBSE or equivalent.

faqs.answer: In 2023, a minimum of 50% of the total points needed to graduate from an accredited university and at least three years of full-time work experience in a managerial or supervisory capacity will be needed to be eligible for the MBA programme at World University of Design (WUD). Furthermore, applicants need to receive at least a 50% on the WUD-conducted PG-DAT (Post Graduate Diploma in Aptitude Test).

faqs.question: Can I join World University of Design directly?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot join the World University of Design directly. Firstly, you have to give an aptitude test, and secondly, an on-campus interview will be conducted. After passing both the steps, you can join the university. The World University of Design offers programs and degrees at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. Built on a culture of creativity & innovation, students enjoy the focus on studio learning, creative process, small class size with direct access to faculty and expert technical resources. To apply for admission, visit the official website of the World University of Design and fill out the application form before the deadline.

faqs.question: Does World University of Design accept NIFT exam score?
faqs.answer: Yes, the World University of Design accepts NIFT exam scores. Valid scores of NIFT, NID, D-Art, CEED, and UCEED exams can be considered in lieu of DAT, and those of CET, CAT, MAT, and XAT in lieu of GAT. Candidates with a good NIFT exam score can apply for admission to the university and may be shortlisted based on their performance for the next stages of the admission process, which include a personal interview and the showcasing of creative evidence such as a portfolio, drawings, photographs, or crafts.

Further, over 200 recruiters took part in the placement drive and the top recruiters include- Amazon, Axiom, Meraki etc made into the list at World University of Design placements 2025.
Moreover, the internship stats have been out on the official website. The highest stipend offered was INR 35 Thousand per month . The average internship stipend was INR 15.5 Thousand per month .

outlook.description:
WUD has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Architecture (Private)' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for WUD indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Architecture (Private)' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, WUD's rank is #24, the same as last year's rank in the 'Architecture (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and I guess placements are not much great.
reviews.review_text: I never visited the college until now due to a pandemic. However, I saw some photos and some feedback about our college, and I came to know that the infrastructure is good. But there is less workshop area in our college. I don't know about the facilities provided in hostels. Quality food is served in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities but student are not friendly with each other.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is so good and there are lot of facilities in Hostel also. Every room has AC. There are medical facilities and laundry also the environment is so good and if we talk about sports Thera are lot sports like football, badminton, basketball etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good Course, but dull college.
reviews.review_text: The university is of humble size. Almost all classes are air-conditioned, with proper generator backup. Animation and Game Design has fairly up-to-date systems (RTX 3070ti, some Ryzen CPUs) with Wi-Fi available. It's a little slow, but it does the job. Hostel infrastructure is good; there is an elevator, and the rooms are air-conditioned during summers and heated during winters. There is a geyser available, but mess food is dull, and no non-veg is available. Basketball, volleyball, and badminton...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is very good, infrastructure is average and curriculum is also good.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi of the college and hostel is very bad sometimes and sometimes average also. The overall infrastructure of the college isn't that good; it can be said to be average infrastructure. In the hostel, you will get attached washrooms; everyday room cleaning services and mess are also available. The quality of mess food is also average. There are medical facilities available in college, and many other sports facilities are also available, like a volleyball court, football ground, basketball co...

reviews.review_heading: Best and safest college experience.
reviews.review_text: The food is suited for people coming from all the states; it ranges from South Indian food to North Indian and Chinese on weekends. Food is provided 4 times a day: Breakfast, Lunch, snacks, and dinner. The hostel is filled with rooms of three sharing with Induction and refrigerator on every floor. Lifts are available 24/7. And a curfew on campus where students need to return back to their hostels at 9:40. Both hostels have common rooms with TVs and games like carrom.

reviews.review_heading: Review of World University of Design.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is still under development. The Wi-Fi facility is good. Labs are well-equipped with a lot of computers. Computers are up to date with the latest software. The library is equipped with all the required books. Our classrooms are spacious.

faqs.question: Does SRG Engineering College provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SRG Engineering College is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech. The fee structure for the SRG Engineering College programmes is around INR 50,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    SRG Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

highlights.summary: Founded in 1996, GRD Institute of Management and Technology powered by Sunstone is a private institute. It is located in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. GRD Institute of Management and Technology powered by Sunstone provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 6 courses across specialisation such as Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, BCA and BBA. faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: All the faculty members of PM in People's University are very good.

content.Placements: Whatever course we are doing, Application, Finance, Marketing, if we talk about it, the package is a minimum of 3 LPA and a maximum of 7 LPA. The person who is senior to us spent so much in placement, and the person with me also spent so much. A 4.5 LPA package is installed.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel and canteen facilities are very good. The library and the arrangement of resources are very good. The hostel is also fine, and the canteen and food are satisfactory. For medical emergencies, the campus has its own hospital, so there is no need to worry.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Great placement and strong infrastructure, but faculty needs improvement in such areas.

content.Placements: The package is good, and the student in my batch is around 70, and a maximum 50% to 60% of students got their internships. The companies came to our college like Axis Bank, Amazon, and many more. The highest package of my college is 12 LPA to 14 LPA. Thank you.
content.Infrastructure: We get very good facilities in our hostel. We get food 4 times a day, which is very good. Wi-Fi has been installed in both college and hostel campuses. New activities are happening, such as sports day, cultural programs, seminars, and learning classes. A medical facility is available. My university owns two hospitals.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I don't think I am dissatisfied.

content.Placements: In my college, almost every student got placed in their year. I took admission last year in my college, and I am 100% sure that I got placed in 3rd year of my college. There are also many students who got 11 LPA. We are so happy about that. I think you should try this college once.
content.Infrastructure: My college facilities are too good. Our campus is so big. Our classroom is also so huge that maximum 100 students sit in one class. Our campus is so clean and green. There are many facilities offered by college like 3-4 canteens on our campus.

individual_reviews.title: This college is the best private dental college of central India.

content.Placements: This is basically not a placement degree. You need to set up your own clinic. But this college has a number of patients. So the patient exposure is high, and you can practice well, so the chances of your handwork getting better are high. BDS provides nine different branches like oral surgery, prosthodontics, endodontics, orthodontics, periodontics, pedodontics, Ph.D. radiology, oral, and maxillofacial surgery. The internship is in the college itself, for which you get paid. individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied as faculty members are good, with good infrastructure and good patient loads.

content.Placements: 70 percent of students get jobs or open their own clinics or pursue MS afterward. Our college offers MS too. The patient load is great here, and we get to learn many things. Faculty members and seniors are really good and helpful, and we have a central library here.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi facilities here, and each department has its own lab. The classrooms are quite big with projectors and AC. Hostels for both girls and boys are provided, and hostel rooms have a bed, almirah, study table, chair, and side locker. The food is also decent.

paragraphs: Candidates are shortlisted for the courses offered byPeople's Universitythrough a merit-based admission process. The institute currently offers courses at the UG, PG, Advanced Masters and Certificate levels.

For admission to the courses provided byPeople's University, candidates must complete the application form, which is available online on the official website of the institute. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department. The institute provides courses in various streams such asEngineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science and Nursing, etc. There are several courses for candidates to choose from at People's University. Courses are offered at various levels, including UG, PG, Advanced Masters and Certificate. Candidates who are qualified for admission toPeople's University coursesmust pay the People's University fee, which isINR 37,000 - 78,07,500.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BBA at People’s University?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for the general BBA programme at People's University, candidates must have passed Class 12 with at least 50% marks. For BBA in Hospitality andHotel Administration, students need a minimum of 45% marks (40% for reserved category candidates) in their Class 12 examination.

faqs.question: Is BBA admission at People’s University merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BBA programme at People's University is primarily entrance-based. Candidates are expected to appear for recognised entrance exams like CUET. However, final selection also considers academic performance in Class 12 and is finalised through college-level counselling conducted by the university's Admission Committee.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted for the BBA at People’s University?
faqs.answer: People's University considers scores from recognised entrance exams like the CUET (Common University Entrance Test) for admission to its BBA programme. Prospective candidates are encouraged to visit the official website for the most accurate and up-to-date information on accepted entrance exams and related admission criteria.

reviews.review_text: The hostel and canteen facilities are very good. The library and the arrangement of resources are very good. The hostel is also fine, and the canteen and food are satisfactory. For medical emergencies, the campus has its own hospital, so there is no need to worry.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by People's Institute of Management and ResearchReviewed on 5 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great placement and strong infrastructure, but faculty needs improvement in such areas.
reviews.review_text: We get very good facilities in our hostel. We get food 4 times a day, which is very good. Wi-Fi has been installed in both college and hostel campuses. New activities are happening, such as sports day, cultural programs, seminars, and learning classes. A medical facility is available. My university owns two hospitals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by People's Institute of Management and ResearchReviewed on 18 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I don't think I am dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: My college facilities are too good. Our campus is so big. Our classroom is also so huge that maximum 100 students sit in one class. Our campus is so clean and green. There are many facilities offered by college like 3-4 canteens on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best private dental college of central India.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are renovated. You get both single as well as double-sharing rooms. Wi-Fi facilities are there, and classrooms are good. There is a huge library, and you get every other book you need for your course. So, the infrastructure of this college is amazing. Classes are big, and they have space for all 100 students. Facilities guide you with every possible thing and stuff they can. They are so kind, patient, and gentle towards their students. Hostel facilities are good. You get a mess with...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied as faculty members are good, with good infrastructure and good patient loads.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi facilities here, and each department has its own lab. The classrooms are quite big with projectors and AC. Hostels for both girls and boys are provided, and hostel rooms have a bed, almirah, study table, chair, and side locker. The food is also decent.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at the People’s University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are very much up to the standards. The college has a big library in the campus. Labs are of standard along with having knowledgeable lab assistants. The hostel facilities are provided by the University and the university provides a good hostel room with general required things available.

reviews.review_heading: Completely satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: This College has great infrastructure. This college provides complete facilities to their students. The classrooms are fully air conditioned, digital library and digital classrooms are available here. High-speed Wi-Fi service is also there for the staff and students.

reviews.review_heading: Best staff for UG students and highly qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college is fully covered with natural greeneries with all sort of facilities like gym badminton courts and canteens. Libraries have Wi-Fi, lifts for patients and students. Campus have great mess with tasty foods. Basketball and football grounds and a very safe environment for girls.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by School of Research & Technology, People's UniversityReviewed on 15 Dec 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members, facilities, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In the college, facilities and infrastructure available in our mechanical department were very good. There was a separate building for our department. The machinery provided in the workshop was working properly. Our new classrooms were neat and clean. The hostel was very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by School of Research & Technology, People's UniversityReviewed on 19 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It has value for money. It is a private university with great infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: People's University was established in 2011 in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. It is spread across 70 acres and is considered India's largest single-campus university. The university comprises 11 institutes that offer various UG and PG courses. The university comprises a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, libraries, auditorium, stadium, gymnasium, medical/dental hospital, and ATM.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by School of Research & Technology, People's UniversityReviewed on 5 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Better option in low budget.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities provided by the college are Very Good. New Infrastructure is being provided by the university which include an indoor and an outdoor stadium. The college provides all the necessary facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The campus environment is excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It provides excellent and trained faculty members. There is Wi-Fi, an air-conditioner classroom with a digital board, a central library with more than 30 computers, emergency medical facilities for students, skill laboratories, good quality food, free yoga classes, and a gym.

reviews.review_heading: The college has suffered a downfall in recent years with a lack of quality education.
reviews.review_text: According to the fee structure, the campus is more disappointing than ever. No campus Wi-Fi facility is available. Classrooms are non-air-conditioned with basic technology only. Sports equipment is lacking, and grounds and arenas are never maintained. There is always a complaint about the hostel's mess.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by School of Research & Technology, People's UniversityReviewed on 18 Apr 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in everything. I would recommend students to take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: It provides a good infrastructure in the engineering department, medical department, commerce field department, school department, and sports having many playgrounds. There are separate playgrounds for every section. This university is having very clean and steady hostels wardens and guardians who are very good with students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but there should be more teachers and better infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are good. The campus has 2 buildings for physiotherapy. The canteens are good. There are 3-4 canteens and a supermarket, which are helpful for people who live in the hostel. Library facilities are good, and there are 2 libraries, a central library and a college library.

college_info.college_name: People's University Scholarship Details
Akal University

highlights.summary:
Admissions 2023-24 are open for all the courses. Candidates can check and apply for the interested courses through the official website.

Akal University was established in 2005 to uphold the three basic principles of higher education namely; Teaching, Learning, and Research. Akal Bhatinda offers UG and PG programmes in mathematics, physics, chemistry, botany, zoology, psychology, economics and commerce, English, and Punjabi languages. Furthermore, the University also offers PhD programmes in Zoology, Botany, Chemistry, Physics, English, and Economics.

Akal Bhatinda campus is well-equipped with ultra-modern facilities for teaching and research, Wi-Fi campus, modern labs, internet-linked smart classrooms, high tech well-stocked library facilities, CCTV cameras for special security of girl students, modern residential accommodation for teachers and separate hostel facilities for boys and girls, sports and recreational facilities for boys and girls.

Akal Bhatinda has collaboration with Brayn School of Business and Economics, Department of Information System and Supply Chain Management, and the University of North Carolina, USA. Furthermore, Akal Business School, embodies the provision to complete the second year of the MBA programme at the University of North Carolina, USA.

Akal Bhatinda admission process is completed online. Applicants should fill the form available at the website along with the prescribed documents. Admissions to Akal Bhatinda is based on merit. The duration of all the programmes offered by Akal Bhatinda differs from course-to-course. Candidates seeking admissions to Akal Bhatinda can refer below:

Akal University offers BA, BSc, BCom, BSc BEd, BA BEd, BCA, and BTech programme at UG level in multiple specialisations. Furthermore, Akal University offers three two-year PG programmes including MSc, MA, and MCom in multiple specialisations. Mentioned below are the key courses offered by Akal Bhatinda along with their eligibility criteria and fee structure:

Akal Bhatinda placements are monitored by a designated placement cell. The cell invites experts to interact with the students and guide them about their careers. Furthermore, the University welcomes different institutions to employ our well-deserving students. Some key recruiters are Jivo Wellness, Akal Academy, and Kalgirdhar Trust.

Akal Bhatinda Scholarships are offered to various students based on the following:

reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities, etc.

review_content.Placements: About 80 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, 3 LPA, and the average is 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. About 60 percent got internships at TCS, Infosys, and startups with roles like software developer, web developer, and data analytics.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and Wi-Fi-enabled campus support learning. The library is rich in books and digital resources. Hostel rooms are clean, food is hygienic, and medical, sports, and recreational facilities are well-maintained for students. Everything is well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and knowledgeable staff.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students got placed. The maximum package is Rs. 30,000 after an internship. Top recruiting companies are from Mohali and Chandigarh. 100% of students got internships but half of them got paid internships. Software engineer and web developer are top roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my department, there are facilities like ACs, computer labs, Wi-Fi, etc. Classrooms are very well-designed. There is a big library which has a quiet environment. In the hostel, security is a good point. The food is very good and healthy.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, It's Nice and Good

review_content.Placements: Forty percent of the students are placed. The highest package is 120,000, and the average package is 300,000 in the B.Tech field of Computer Science. There is a 90 percent chance of securing an internship in our course. The course offers many top roles, such as Software Developer and Data Analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-furnished and have digital boards. The library is air-conditioned and creates a very peaceful environment. The hostel rooms are comfortable, but the mess food is not as good as expected according to the mess fees. The food in the canteen is good.

faqs.question: Q: What are the subjects taught in BA?

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.
faqs.question: Q: What is the Scope of Humanities and Social Science courses?

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

review_summary.college_name: Akal University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence and machine learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent learning environment with supportive faculty, good facilities, and a disciplined campus.

content.Placements: Akal University's SBCA programme reported has around 70-80% placement, with an average package of about 5-9 LPA, and top recruiters like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL, and Teach Mahindra. Internships are offered to roughly 50- 60% of students, mostly in IT roles such as software development, web development, and data analytics.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has strong academic infrastructure: Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, modern computers and other labs, and a well-stocked library for study and research. Hostel accommodation is separate for boys & girls, with furnished rooms, security (CCTV), and a mess & canteen serving vegetarian food; there are also medical support, sports and recreational facilities.

individual_reviews.course: BBA.(Hons) in Business Analytics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am totally satisfied here.

content.Placements: 90 to 95 percent of students are placed in this course. The result of our course is 100 percent, and after 1st year, we also got an internship opportunity. The lowest package offered by this course is around 5 LPA, but according to freshers, it is okay.
content.Infrastructure: In our university, all the labs are AC labs. All the lab assistants are very supportive, and the hostel facilities are also good. Apart from the labs, our university hostel is neat and clean, and the food in the mess is also okay. Medical facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence and machine learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities, etc.

content.Placements: About 80 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, 3 LPA, and the average is 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. About 60 percent got internships at TCS, Infosys, and startups with roles like software developer, web developer, and data analytics.
content.Infrastructure: Well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and Wi-Fi-enabled campus support learning. The library is rich in books and digital resources. Hostel rooms are clean, food is hygienic, and medical, sports, and recreational facilities are well-maintained for students. Everything is well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and knowledgeable staff.

content.Placements: 50% of students got placed. The maximum package is Rs. 30,000 after an internship. Top recruiting companies are from Mohali and Chandigarh. 100% of students got internships but half of them got paid internships. Software engineer and web developer are top roles.
content.Infrastructure: In my department, there are facilities like ACs, computer labs, Wi-Fi, etc. Classrooms are very well-designed. There is a big library which has a quiet environment. In the hostel, security is a good point. The food is very good and healthy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, It's Nice and Good

content.Placements: Forty percent of the students are placed. The highest package is 120,000, and the average package is 300,000 in the B.Tech field of Computer Science. There is a 90 percent chance of securing an internship in our course. The course offers many top roles, such as Software Developer and Data Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-furnished and have digital boards. The library is air-conditioned and creates a very peaceful environment. The hostel rooms are comfortable, but the mess food is not as good as expected according to the mess fees. The food in the canteen is good.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Ideal Institute of Management and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Ideal is the best college. But the placements are not good.

content.Placements: The placements in our college were good. I got placed in Apollo Tyres at Chennai. The package offered is 3.2 LPA. The average package is 2.4 LPA. Most of the companies visited the college for the placements, and mainly the companies located in NCR. We have good placements for CS and IT. All the students of CS and IT departments got placed in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. As the college is in outskirts of the city, we have a transport problem to go the college. But, you get all the facilities you want. The campus is full of greenery, and there is an eco-friendly environment. If you need PG seat, you can get easily. We have a big market near the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: No required facilities available and no education, management system.

content.Placements: Placement is below than average placement of other engineering colleges. About 10 percents students placed including off campus placements. Placements are decreasing year by year. Only 4-5 companies visit in college in 2017-2018. In placement records college is not good. Average package of placement was around 1.8lakh.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi in classrooms. Wi-Fi only available for hostel with low speed. Labs are 2 star out of 5. Library is average and average facilities available in library. There is no medical facility. In the field of game and sports there is no equipments available from college side only field available from college side. And there is no canteen in college and infrastructure is average of college. I face a problem to enter the college because of infrastructure and management of college.

individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure of our college is okay. No good faculty.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are average but not bad. The college management should strive to increase the placements. They should arrange more opportunities for the talented students. The average package offered is 2LPA for the deserving candidates.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. We have a separate hostel facility for girls and boys. A gym is also available in the hostel. We have a high speed and effective Wi-Fi facility. The labs of the college are okay. We have many sports such as badminton, volleyball etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Really bad college. No need to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: There is no placement from this college which is really bad. There are good facilities, all promises at the time of admission are fake, never trust on this college. The result of many students is also not complete. The worst college you ever see in your whole life. They don't provide good knowledge, really bad teaching staff, and management is too bad that they don't do anything for students.
content.Infrastructure: A really bad infrastructure of the college. On the main gate of the college, you can see that there is written that "students are not allowed" it look like we are in a jungle. Simply, we can see that this college is a jungle, not a college where you can see dogs and snakes easily. The infrastructure of the college is really old that the building can break at any time.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Engineering And Technology (Polytechnic) in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college is good enough.

content.Placements: The placements offered were good enough. Around, 50% of the students got the placements. The highest package for the students who got placed was one lakh eighty thousand per annum. Many reputed companies visited the campus. The students got the internships at the college. No stipend was offered. There is a placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure facilities are very good. There is Wi-Fi facility in the college. The computer labs and the library are air-conditioned. The classrooms are very big. Proper medical facilities are there in the college. The workshop is being conducted. Proper games and sports facilities are there. The food available in the canteen is good.

faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
faqs.answer: TheaverageBTech CSEsalary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. But,

faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
faqs.answer: TheaverageBTech CSEsalary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package.
