reviews.review_heading: Ideal is the best college. But the placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. As the college is in outskirts of the city, we have a transport problem to go the college. But, you get all the facilities you want. The campus is full of greenery, and there is an eco-friendly environment. If you need PG seat, you can get easily. We have a big market near the campus.

reviews.review_heading: No required facilities available and no education, management system.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi in classrooms. Wi-Fi only available for hostel with low speed. Labs are 2 star out of 5. Library is average and average facilities available in library. There is no medical facility. In the field of game and sports there is no equipments available from college side only field available from college side. And there is no canteen in college and infrastructure is average of college. I face a problem to enter the college because of infrastructure and management of college.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of our college is okay. No good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. We have a separate hostel facility for girls and boys. A gym is also available in the hostel. We have a high speed and effective Wi-Fi facility. The labs of the college are okay. We have many sports such as badminton, volleyball etc.

reviews.review_heading: Really bad college. No need to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: A really bad infrastructure of the college. On the main gate of the college, you can see that there is written that "students are not allowed" it look like we are in a jungle. Simply, we can see that this college is a jungle, not a college where you can see dogs and snakes easily. The infrastructure of the college is really old that the building can break at any time.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good enough.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure facilities are very good. There is Wi-Fi facility in the college. The computer labs and the library are air-conditioned. The classrooms are very big. Proper medical facilities are there in the college. The workshop is being conducted. Proper games and sports facilities are there. The food available in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: The management of the college is not at all supportive.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility and no medical facilities for the students. The canteen is available 2 years back but not now. The classrooms and labs are quite spacious, and anyone can be comfortable. There is no renovation in the infrastructure of the campus since 10-12 years. Sports facilities found to have favour only to hostel's students.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good but there are a lack of students.
reviews.review_text: The college building is in good condition and big enough. It has a big library, playgrounds for both indoor and outdoor activities. It also provides a separate room for every teacher, so he can store his data which he will share with the students. The classrooms are big enough for 60 students.

reviews.review_heading: Placement was good in 2015 but later, went down. It's up to you take admission or not.
reviews.review_text:
All the facilities are available but they're not excellent.

But the infrastructure is, overall, good.
The hostel facility is good but is too costly.
The mess is not good.

A lot of sports facilities are available for sports like cricket and football.

The students mainly play cricket and football but volleyball and basketball facilities are also available.
Some indoor games are also available like chess, badminton, table tennis, tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Worst college for engineering in Ghaziabad.
reviews.review_text: Just average infrastructure. I usually don't eat outside especially from the campus's canteen. Just a big field as the college in situated in villages area. Broken benches, no air conditioning, no proper ventilation. Food quality is also bad as I have usually heard from my friends.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because the college does not provide good placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The labs are in good condition, and the classrooms and library are absolutely fine. There was every facility in the hostel, like sports, fans etc. Mess food was okay. All sports kits were there. Medical facilities were available.

reviews.review_heading: Placements and infrastructure are average, but teachers are good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides hostel facilities, which are not compulsory for every student. It depends on the students who want to stay or not. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the college, and classrooms are also good. The library provides new books as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not good in our college. Only a few companies are allowed by the college. Our college provides internships in the 7th semester in reputed companies. The top recruiting companies are Coca-Cola, Beverage, Euro Food, Patanjali Foods, Haldiram's, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has 5 labs, and they are food, chemistry lab, micronutrient lab, food engineering lab, food microbiology lab, etc. . All equipment is available in the lab. Our college provides many facilities like a library, sports, canteen, and gymnasium.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with better placements.

review_content.Placements: Many students from the previous batch have been placed in reputed food processing industries like Patanjali, Coca-Cola Beverages,  Cargill Food, etc. The placement rate is about 80%, but salary packages are low.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has separate hostels for boys and girls, a gym, a library, a canteen, Wi-Fi, etc. The hostel fee is Rs. 12000 per annum, not including the mess fee.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are well-qualified. They hold an M.Tech. or Ph.D. in food processing technology. Exams are conducted by VNMKV. Exams are conducted semester-wise. The first, third, and fifth semesters are difficult, but passing is possible. The pass percentage is above 60%.

content.Placements: The salary package offered by Accenture is 3.5 LPA. Almost 60% of students got internships at Byju's. Top MNCs visit our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities. All labs are very neat and updated. Our college has a good environment. The food served in the hostel is very good. The hostel rooms are very clean.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very friendly. They teach us well. They are friendly. They are very genius and experienced. They prepare us for semester exams. They teach us well. It is very difficult to study.

The companies that visit my college for placements are like southern. There is no internship offered by the college management. The top roles the company offered was in customer support.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was okay, they have library availability. There is no hostel facility. You can find the private hostels near to the college. Canteen is available in the college and coming to the games and sports, they don't give that much importance to that.

individual_reviews.title: In the college we have experienced faculty with good placements and average infrastructure

content.Placements: 20 percent of students were placed in my course. 3LPA is the highest salary and 2 LPA is the lowest salary offered. Amazon, IBM, Genpact, Airtel, Sutherland are top recruiting companies for my course. Consumer relations officer is the role offered. 2.8 LPA is the highest and 2.2 is the lowest salary offered in my computer Science. 10 percent of them got internships from Q-spiders.
content.Infrastructure: As my college is shifted from bhongir to ramkoti, Infrastructure can be described as average with required classrooms, labs and library. There is no hostel in our college and there are many private hostels nearby. Canteen work is still going on as college is shifted here recently and it will all be done by next sem.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aurora's Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. All labs are very neat and updated. Our college has a good environment. The food served in the hostel is very good. The hostel rooms are very clean.

reviews.review_heading: The placement rate is very less
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was okay, they have library availability. There is no hostel facility. You can find the private hostels near to the college. Canteen is available in the college and coming to the games and sports, they don't give that much importance to that.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aurora's Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The huge relief was the college shifting from Bhongir to Hyderabad, which would cut off the long journey. Many students used to travel from Hyderabad to Bhongir, which is nearly 50 kilometres far from the city. Students had to start very early and reach late to home due to a long journey.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest not to waste your degree by studying in this college.
reviews.review_text: There are no proper labs, and they won't even provide internal marks. There is no Wi-Fi on the campus, and there is no college hostel. Students need to search for private hostels. Labs are old and outdated.

reviews.review_heading: In the college we have experienced faculty with good placements and average infrastructure
reviews.review_text: As my college is shifted from bhongir to ramkoti, Infrastructure can be described as average with required classrooms, labs and library. There is no hostel in our college and there are many private hostels nearby. Canteen work is still going on as college is shifted here recently and it will all be done by next sem.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our department are good. Wi-Fi facility is good, and the college also provides labs, good classrooms and library. The weather is beautiful. Quality of facilities is good, and there is a private hostel facility, canteen, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members in our college are good.
reviews.review_text: In our campus, there is a ground for playing cricket, and all the indoor games are provided by college management. Every day we will play games. There are many labs in our college, like PPS lab, EDC lab, etc. For each group, they have their own lab. Classrooms are very neat, and sufficient benches are available for all the students.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is disciplined with good faculty. Dissatisfied because of placements and surroundings.
reviews.review_text: For the CSE department like all engineering colleges, classrooms, labs and a library are provided. Our college till 2019 was in Bhongir, Nalgonda, but recently in 2019 in our final year, the college is shifted to Abids, Hyderabad and college is located in the centre of a metropolitan city. There is no college hostel, but there are many hostels in its surroundings. Students can choose hostels based on their budget and comforts. As it is recently shifted, there is no canteen in our college. Howeve...

reviews.review_heading: Aurora is a good college and provides good placements, faculty, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a digital library, Wi-Fi, and many labs. We have an incubation centre. Classrooms are large and have good ventilation. The infrastructure is good. Quality of food available in the canteen was good. They provided healthy and delicious food to the students. Hostel rooms were good. We did not face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Aurora's Engineering College is the temple of learning.
reviews.review_text: We have very useful labs at our college. The library is the best part of our college. Recruitment training sessions are conducted for students every week, and they are very useful. Our college provides good facilities. Our college provides Wi-Fi for both students and faculty.

reviews.review_heading: My college is a temple of learning.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very good and all instruments are provided. Every day, the faculty check the instruments and replace the damaged instruments immediately if any exists. The computers are provided in every lab, and we also have computer labs in our college. Wi-Fi facility is provided with high-speed.

reviews.review_heading: Very much satisfied with the faculty and rules of the college.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi facility is not provided. Labs are good. Classrooms are good with projectors. Every year, games are conducted across Hyderabad. Canteen food has good taste, and good quality is maintained. The library has all types of books. Students can get one textbook for a week, and have to return it after a week.

reviews.review_heading: Aurora is a temple of learning.
reviews.review_text: Every faculty member is very cooperative, and the labs are maintained very clean. The classrooms are also very neat with projector facilities. If I talk about the library, I can describe it as the best place to pass our time as there are a lot of books to read with curiosity.

reviews.review_heading: An awesome college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides excellent education of engineering and technology. The campus has good environment to take up quality research and dissemination of knowledge. Labs are very good. Classrooms are huge and clean. separate seminar halls are available for each department.

reviews.review_heading: Experienced staff are needed.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi connectivity in the whole campus. There is no proper function of machines in the labs. The library is good, and we get all departmental books there. Sports facilities are good but there is no personal trainer in the campus, and there is no medical facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Rajdhani Engineering College.

content.Placements: At present time placements are very poor, but approximately 90% of students are placed. Placements are depend on technical sector companies, that company interested or not about this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Wi-Fi, classrooms, laboratories, library, and playground are available in this college. The infrastructure can verify all facilities, which will be in technical colleges. The canteen and hostel facility is not good because students are not interested in the hostel.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are helpful. Our college provides all facilities for the student but at this time students are not interested to go to college. The semester exam is taken by Rajasthan Technical University, Kotak. Practical and mid-term exams are taken by this college. Exams are not very difficult.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of the faculty members' help.

content.Placements: Our college tries to organise and invite many companies for placements such as HCL, Dell, BHEL, MHPP, etc. All companies come to the campus and do the recruitment as per their requirements like doing some group discussion, mock test and some other activities.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has all the facilities like a library where all students can study well. It also has a Wi-Fi facility all around the campus so that every student can browse their related topic that helps in their study. The campus has all sports grounds such as cricket ground, basketball ground, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: A review of Rajdhani Campus.

content.Placements: Many companies visited the campus for placements. I attended the placement drives of many companies, but due to some personal reason, I didn't join in any of them. Some of my classmates got placed in those companies. There are many companies that conduct a simple test and a technical test and personal interview in the placement process.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very famous in Jaipur. There are many classrooms for different streams, and there are some digital classrooms also. We also have a central library in our campus for technical and non-technical and general study books, and a section for newspaper and internet surfing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in our college.

content.Placements: From Our senior batch maximum package was 18 Lacs. 25% students were selected from our senior batch. The highest package of annual salary was 18 Lacs and minimum package of annual salary was 1.8 Lacs. And average package of annual salary was3.5 Lacs. Almost many companies were visit our campus.
content.Infrastructure: In our college also facilities of wi-fi, chemistry lab, physics lab, computer lab and many more labs facilities available. A library, sports ground and many facilities of sports. A good facilities of ventilation in our classrooms and labs. Good facilities of our canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: In Rajdhani Campus, have good infrastructure and good furniture. Good placement in 2017.

content.Placements: Rajdhani Engineering College have good placement in year 2017 and 2016. 70 percent of students were placed in 2015 year. Total selections are 300+ and Maximum package is 18lacs per annum Minimum package is 1.8 lacs par annum and Average is 3.7 lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, library, sports, labs, computer labs, hostel are available in the campus. Good and vegetable food are available in the canteen and mess. I didn't not face any infrastructure related issues in college during my session. The air cooled residential apartment suits consist of 60 rooms.

overview_faqs.question: Is Karnal Institute of Technology and Management a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Karnal Institute of Technology and Management is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Karnal Institute of Technology and Management has a rating of 3.71 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.78 on Campus Life, 2.89 on Placements, 4 on Faculty and 3.78 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Karnal Institute of Technology and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good. Teachers are very diligent.

content.Placements: About 20% of students get placed in this course. A number of companies offer jobs to students. About 10-20% of students get internships from my course. Many top roles are offered in my course like site engineer, quality engineer, and many other important roles that we can get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very good and the housekeeping is well-maintained. A library is also available in the college in which we can read the books. Sports functions are also organised. The quality of the food is very good. The infrastructure is very good and well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Excellent for student seeing scholarship.

content.Placements: 30% of students got placement last year and the average salary offered is 15-20k. Many companies come to take interview for direct recruiting. The highest salary offered by the companies is 35k and the lowest is 12k. Internship is done well and good from my batch including paid intern too.
content.Infrastructure: The classroom is well furnished and talking about the infrastructure it's average. There is Wi-Fi facility in the college. Labs are well maintained with all equipments. College also have the hostel facility with well furnished room and also have mess where we love to have food. There is big play ground where students can play as well, also have canteen facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The best college in all over the karnal is karnal.

content.Placements: Karnal institute of technology and management college is good in placement and in other activities. Many of civil and mechanical almost all branches have their placement in best comapny. In last month. There are so many student are selected for civil branch.
content.Infrastructure: Karnal institute of technology have their best infrastructure in all oevr karnal and near by disttick. Room are have natural lighting and air. There are separate building of all courses and the seating in the class room is so good. Seating capicity of a room is about 60.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: The management have good experience and are polite.

content.Placements: The campus placements are not much good. The college holds the campus walk-in, but only small companies participate in it, and only a few students get placement. Overall, the campus placement is bad. I didn't get campus placement. Sometimes the topper of the batch gets a job in college as teacher or lab attendant.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel life is amazing. It is far from the markets, so students require their own conveyance to visit the market. The hostel and campus are completely Wi-Fi enabled and air-conditioned. The classroom and lab are average. The canteen is also average, and you can't have food according to your wish.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017

content.Other: College is very good. The placement and campus of this college are awesome. This institute study system is very best to compare to all another college in this region. I like this college so much. I recommended to other this college because crowd and campus life is very good.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Aurora College honest review.

content.Placements: The placement in our course is mostly not good, the average package offered is around 2–3 LPA, the highest package offered is 5 LPA. Top recruiters generally belong to some specialties of psychiatry, clinics, or hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities on the campus are very good, the infrastructure is very good, Wi-Fi facility is available in the college. The library is also present with a well-stocked collection of books, food in the canteen is very good, and basic medical support is available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's an awesome college for M.A. in Psychology course.

content.Placements: Over 95 percent of the students have been assigned. The average compensation is 6 LPA, with the lowest being 3 LPA and the highest being 10 LPA. Amaha, Mannah Wellness, Neurosynk Research, and others are among the top recruitment firms. Approximately 90 percent of students got internships. Clinical psychologists, psychotherapists, and other advanced positions are available.
content.Infrastructure: Good access, Wi-Fi with fast internet, and well-equipped classrooms with lots of lab space for each department. A good library with over 50,000 volumes and periodicals. The campus is surrounded by trees and plants, making it an ideal learning environment.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college for everything.

content.Placements: Nearly 85% of students in my course are placed. It depends on how skilled the person is. The lowest package on our campus is roughly 3.5 LPA, while the largest is 15 LPA. Among the top recruiting companies are Deloitte, Infosys, Capgemini, and others. Our college offers top professions, including HR recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has excellent facilities. Labs and classrooms are kept apart. There is a library with an enormous collection. Students can stay at a hostel with adequate accommodation. The quality of the mess cuisine is excellent. This place has Wi-Fi. Everyone gets access to medical assistance around the clock.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Aurora PG College review.

content.Placements: The placement in our course is around 85 percent. The highest package offered in our course is around 12 LPA. The average package is around 4–5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are banks, Capgemini, Accenture, etc. Around 90 percent of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are extremely good. Wi-Fi is present in the college. There are modern classrooms and computer labs. The quality of the hostel is good. All essential facilities are available in the hostel. A medical facility is present.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Average academics with weak civil engineering placements.

content.Placements: In a class of 60, only 5 got placed. The highest package was 6 LPA, and the average was 5 LPA. Sutherland and Virtusa were the main recruiters. Students did not get internships as the college provides very limited support. And not up to the mark of the placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college does not have a proper cricket ground, and the campus is very close to nearby villages, which leads to animals like buffaloes entering the grounds often. This can be distracting and affect regular sports activities. There is also a masjid located inside the college premises, which is part of the campus environment.

Aurora's Scientific and Technological Institute,Aurora Group of Institute admission 2023 to the BTech course is done through TS EAMCET exam followed by TS EAMCET 2023 Counselling which is to be conducted in three phases namely, Phase 1, Phase 2 and Final Phase. hostel_campus.college_name: Aurora Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Aurora's Degree and PG CollegeReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Aurora College honest review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities on the campus are very good, the infrastructure is very good, Wi-Fi facility is available in the college. The library is also present with a well-stocked collection of books, food in the canteen is very good, and basic medical support is available in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Aurora's Degree and PG CollegeReviewed on 29 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's an awesome college for M.A. in Psychology course.
reviews.review_text: Good access, Wi-Fi with fast internet, and well-equipped classrooms with lots of lab space for each department. A good library with over 50,000 volumes and periodicals. The campus is surrounded by trees and plants, making it an ideal learning environment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Aurora's Post Graduate College, RamanthapurReviewed on 27 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college for everything.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent facilities. Labs and classrooms are kept apart. There is a library with an enormous collection. Students can stay at a hostel with adequate accommodation. The quality of the mess cuisine is excellent. This place has Wi-Fi. Everyone gets access to medical assistance around the clock.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Aurora's Post Graduate College, RamanthapurReviewed on 26 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Aurora PG College review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are extremely good. Wi-Fi is present in the college. There are modern classrooms and computer labs. The quality of the hostel is good. All essential facilities are available in the hostel. A medical facility is present.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Aurora's Technological and Research InstituteReviewed on 19 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Average academics with weak civil engineering placements.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have a proper cricket ground, and the campus is very close to nearby villages, which leads to animals like buffaloes entering the grounds often. This can be distracting and affect regular sports activities. There is also a masjid located inside the college premises, which is part of the campus environment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Aurora's Business School, Aurora Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 13 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college experience, and  is very satisfying.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is clean and well maintained. There are no hostel facilities, Wi-Fi is available for use. Classrooms support digital teaching. The library is well equipped with a wide range of books and access to online resources. I have not faced any problems here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Aurora's Post Graduate College, RamanthapurReviewed on 24 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A great college with amazing facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at our college are first-rate. There are separate classrooms and labs. A library exists with a vast collection. A hostel with suitable accommodation is available to students. The mess food is of very high quality. Wi-Fi is available here. Everybody has access to 24-hour medical support.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Aurora's Post Graduate College, RamanthapurReviewed on 19 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: One of the better MBAs at Ramanthapur in Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: There is no maintenance or proper guidance in this college. There are no facilities as mentioned, just classrooms and labs with adequate materials. The library is a bit advanced, but there is no Wi-Fi, no sports, and no games. It is a good infrastructure college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Aurora's Post Graduate College, RamanthapurReviewed on 19 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Every year, annual sports festival is organised by the sports committee in our college.
reviews.review_text: My college offers great facilities. Our college provides one computer per class. Wi-Fi is available on campus. The campus meals served at the hotel are very affordable. Medical and sports facilities are provided in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Aurora's Post Graduate College, RamanthapurReviewed on 19 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty members, fantastic campus, and highly recommended.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is excellent. There are distinct labs and classrooms. There is a library with an enormous collection. Students have access to a hostel with adequate accommodation. The quality of the mess food is excellent. There is Wi-Fi available. Everyone has access to round-the-clock medical assistance.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Aurora's Degree and PG CollegeReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Aurora's Degree and PG College.
reviews.review_text: Our university infrastructure is very useful. The classrooms are equipped with digital whiteboards and projectors. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus for students and faculty members. Several computer labs are available with high-speed internet. A well-stocked central library is also available. A well-built auditorium is also available. A canteen is available here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Aurora's Post Graduate CollegeReviewed on 12 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good, and I am satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Our college contains classrooms, canteens, computer labs, a library, and more. No food, such as price or tiffins, is served at the canteen. It sells a few stationery goods, and only offers snacks. According to the students, it is a pretty shop, although the college administration referred to it as a canteen.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Aurora's Post Graduate CollegeReviewed on 11 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for MCA course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, with the best facilities in classrooms and laboratories. Other sports are good, but they cost money to play. The college has all the necessary facilities and equipment. The best part is the campus facilities, nothing too bad to say, the least.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Aurora's Post Graduate CollegeReviewed on 8 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college for doing MCA at a low cost.
reviews.review_text: The facilities here are very good; the infrastructure is also very good. There is free Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are very big and well-maintained. There is a central library where free books are available. There is a college canteen where good-quality food is available at low prices. The medical facilities here are very good. There are arrangements for outdoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Aurora's Post Graduate College, RamanthapurReviewed on 7 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great faculty, awesome campus, highly recommendable.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Classrooms were spacious, and dedicated labs are present. A library with a huge collection was there. Hostel with proper accommodation was available for students. The mess food quality was very good. Wi-Fi facility is available. 24/7 medical support was there for everyone.

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Amazon, Genpact, Infosys, Mahindra, Tata Consultancy, ICICI Bank, Sutherland, Wipro, TCS, Infotech, Axis Bank, Google and Microsoft visit our campus for placements.

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Apex Institute of Technology is up to 345. Good thing to know is that Apex Institute of Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: No placements, faculty members leave after 6 months, outdated labs, and a useless library.

review_content.Placements: Placement scene is NON-EXISTENT. Yes, you read that right. Despite the colleges lofty promises, not a single student from my batch has been placed in a decent job. Our placement coordinator MEGHA DEV was herself a jobless engineering graduate. No training or internship support aswell.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are fine with enough room space. Every room is shared among 4 students. Wi-Fi is available from evening till morning. There is a decent gym in hostel building, a mess, bathrooms are okay. Male Hostel is within the college premises and female hostel is at a distance.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The apex institute of technology college is the best college.

review_content.Placements: Placement in the college is very good. Companies like HCL, Tata, etc. have come for recruitment. I got placed in a computer science based company with a nice salary package.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are 300 and more classes in the college. It has well developed laboratories and rooms are clean. The faculty members are very good and always support the students. They guide the students in the right direction. Hostel rooms are clean.
review_content.Faculty: In the college, there are a minimum of 200 faculty members. They all are qualified. The method they used is very helpful for the students to achieve their goals.

review_summary.college_name: Apex Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good Infrastructure and facilities but it has a bad placement record.

content.Placements: Our college didn't invite any company to the college due to Covid. Moreover, from the records, placements in the college are below average. Students get around 2.5 LPA to 4 LPA in service-based companies like TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. Some local companies nearby are also visiting to hire students. College doesn't provide internship opportunities at all. Students have to apply it off-campus only. Roles offered are mainly for web developers and a few software engineers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. It has a huge library and 3 computer labs. We have Wi-Fi access and large field areas for sports. Facilities in our hostel are average. Mess food quality is not that bad. Canteen is available but not with many choices of eatables. Medical facilities are also well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: No placements, faculty members leave after 6 months, outdated labs, and a useless library.

content.Placements: Placement scene is NON-EXISTENT. Yes, you read that right. Despite the colleges lofty promises, not a single student from my batch has been placed in a decent job. Our placement coordinator MEGHA DEV was herself a jobless engineering graduate. No training or internship support aswell.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are fine with enough room space. Every room is shared among 4 students. Wi-Fi is available from evening till morning. There is a decent gym in hostel building, a mess, bathrooms are okay. Male Hostel is within the college premises and female hostel is at a distance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The apex institute of technology college is the best college.

content.Placements: Placement in the college is very good. Companies like HCL, Tata, etc. have come for recruitment. I got placed in a computer science based company with a nice salary package.
content.Infrastructure: There are 300 and more classes in the college. It has well developed laboratories and rooms are clean. The faculty members are very good and always support the students. They guide the students in the right direction. Hostel rooms are clean.
content.Faculty: In the college, there are a minimum of 200 faculty members. They all are qualified. The method they used is very helpful for the students to achieve their goals.

highlights.summary: Founded in 2000, Arya College is an institute. It is located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Arya College provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 18 courses across specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Business Analytics, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and Electrical Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Arya College fees ranges between INR 90,700 to 1,62,638. The student intake for these courses is 1206. Arya College offers all the campus facilities to students.

Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. The fee structure for the AKIDO College of Engineering programmes is around INR 1,76,000.

faqs.answer: A:    AKIDO College of Engineering offers Degree courses including 5 UG course. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Do anything in your life but not try to take admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: Getting placements from this college is like a dream that is never is going to come true. In this college, there were no placements occured through campus, no students were placed from senior as well as from our batch. Even we haven't got any support for an internship, all students who get an internship or job are on their own reference. You are not going to get any support from the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: On seeing the college from outside you think it is filled with Modern labs, Facilities, etc. There was Wi-Fi in the college but you never get the password of that. All labs have very old and low-quality equipment, many of them don't even work. Computer labs have low configuration PC's no software available, the student has to arrange software to learn. I know well about labs as I am a CSE branch student. Bad quality food in the canteen, the hostel is so messy, there were no sports facility just big grounds available and a volleyball NET put by students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I suggest you not to ruin your future by joining this college.

review_content.Placements: The college does not provide placements for any branch like CSE, CE, ME and ECE. I suggest you not to join this college to ruin and your life because you can learn nothing about the course in this college. The college doesn't have any concern regarding the future of the students, they just make money.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average. The drawback is, the college was established 8 years ago, but the infrastructure and facilities are not yet provided well. No practical lab is in working condition for the students to gain knowledge regarding the topic.

overview_faqs.question: Is AKIDO College of Engineering worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at AKIDO College of Engineering are B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, AKIDO College of Engineering has a rating of 2.7 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 2.5, 2.7, 3 and 2.7 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: AKIDO College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Welcome to AKIDO! It is an IITM school.

content.Placements: Software engineering is the most required role offered to students. About 88% of students get placed in companies like Infosys, Wipro, etc. The highest salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. Roles like web development, computer fundamentals, problem-solving with C language, and mathematical foundation in computers are offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: It has a newly constructed building and furthermore a large one. It provides big classrooms with good-quality desks. The canteen food is fine but not so good. A big lawn and a stage are under construction. It has a spacious campus. It has only one girls' washroom on the ground floor. I went to the 1st floor and the other floors are under construction. The library is big enough and has a vast variety of books. It looks like an actual library.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college and placements. Faculty members and infrastructure are the best .

content.Placements: Nice faculty members and good staff support. As a B.Tech student, they help us with projects, get internships and make us ready for placement. Last year, one of our college students got placed on Flipkart with an amazing package and faculty members helped him a lot.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is great. The library is good and has centralized air conditioning inside the college campus. The labs are good and the computer works very fine. Hostel facilities are not available here but you can rent a PG nearby the college and the course is good for every student .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Do anything in your life but not try to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: Getting placements from this college is like a dream that is never is going to come true. In this college, there were no placements occured through campus, no students were placed from senior as well as from our batch. Even we haven't got any support for an internship, all students who get an internship or job are on their own reference. You are not going to get any support from the college.
content.Infrastructure: On seeing the college from outside you think it is filled with Modern labs, Facilities, etc. There was Wi-Fi in the college but you never get the password of that. All labs have very old and low-quality equipment, many of them don't even work. Computer labs have low configuration PC's no software available, the student has to arrange software to learn. I know well about labs as I am a CSE branch student. Bad quality food in the canteen, the hostel is so messy, there were no sports facility just big grounds available and a volleyball NET put by students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I suggest you not to ruin your future by joining this college.

content.Placements: The college does not provide placements for any branch like CSE, CE, ME and ECE. I suggest you not to join this college to ruin and your life because you can learn nothing about the course in this college. The college doesn't have any concern regarding the future of the students, they just make money.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average. The drawback is, the college was established 8 years ago, but the infrastructure and facilities are not yet provided well. No practical lab is in working condition for the students to gain knowledge regarding the topic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college. The faculty and placement are very good in this college.

content.Placements: This college gives good placement opportunity for the deserving students. The highest salary offered is 6 lacs per annum to the candidate who qualify the placement test. The lowest salary offered is 2 lacs per annum. The 60% students in a batch are placed in the good field.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is not very good, but it is valuable according to the fee structure. The college has good medical facilities. The Wi-Fi is available in all the classroom. Library of this college is also good, and all the necessary books could be found in the library.

paragraphs:
AKIDO College of Engineering course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theAKIDO College of Engineeringapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG programmes in fields of Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software, and more. To know about the eligibility of AKIDO College of Engineering courses, students can visit the website.

AKIDO College of Engineering fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for AKIDO College of Engineering fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on AKIDO College of Engineering admission:

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Chendhuran College of Engineering and Technology admission to BE/BTech courses.

faqs.answer:
A:    Chendhuran College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.
faqs.question: How can I get into Chendhuran College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Chendhuran College of Engineering and Technology offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 4 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Chendhuran College of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Structural Engineering.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Chendhuran College of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Chendhuran College of Engineering and Technology is up to 498. Good thing to know is that Chendhuran College of Engineering and Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

faqs.answer: The BTech Agricultural Engineering syllabus is not similar for all colleges and universities in India. Every institution has a certain set of curriculum guidelines that they follow and set the syllabus in that manner. But, the general topics covered in Agricultural Engineering classes are usually the same.Some important concepts include agricultural processes in industries, farm machinery, surveying methods, soil investigation, tools and control of machinery, horticulture and field crops. You will get a good hang of the field after you pursue a BTech degree course in this field that covers both theoretical as well technical aspects. Know more about -Agricultural Engineering
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Agricultural Engineering syllabus the same across all colleges?

faqs.answer: College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology, Dapoli has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidates completed B.Tech. (Agril. Engg.) or equivalent degree of 4 years duration from any recognised agriculture related University are eligible to apply. Candidates graduated from Other State must have degree from ICAR accredited Agriculture University.B.E. / B.TechCandidate passed 12th/equivalent from Maharashtra State Board of Higher Secondary Education with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics as compulsory subjects and Biology as optional are eligible to apply. Candidate who have passed qualifying examination without Biology/Mathematics will have to complete deficiency courses. Candidate of physically handicapped category with minimum aggregate marks 40% are eligible to apply.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements and faculty members.

content.Placements: As many companies came for recruiting students from our college most of the members are selected with a better package and some other went to do M.Sc. in agriculture, however we can try in other pvt. Companies to work for a better package and preparing for some government exams.
content.Infrastructure: College Wi-Fi is good, labs are considerable with a super good experimental materials and are uesful to students, classrooms are minimal with a capacity of holding 50 to 60 students, Food is average as the hostel is not providing a best quality, they give importance to sports also.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology, Dapoli for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology, Dapoli has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidates completed B.Tech. (Agril. Engg.) or equivalent degree of 4 years duration from any recognised agriculture related University are eligible to apply.
Candidates graduated from Other State must have degree from ICAR accredited Agriculture University.B.E. / B.TechCandidate passed 12th/equivalent from Maharashtra State Board of Higher Secondary Education with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics as compulsory subjects and Biology as optional are eligible to apply.
Candidate who have passed qualifying examination without Biology/Mathematics will have to complete deficiency courses.
Candidate of physically handicapped category with minimum aggregate marks 40% are eligible to apply.
